title: verilator generates C++ that doesn't compile: error: use of undeclared identifier 'VL_SHIFTR_WWQ'

features.name: wide logic vector with variable shift right operation
features.description: Code should include a very wide logic vector (512-bit or larger) with a variable shift right operation where the shift amount is computed at runtime

features.name: wide vector shift with computed shift width
features.description: Code should include shift operations on wide vectors where the shift amount width (33 bits) matches a pattern that triggers undefined VL_SHIFTR_WWQ macro
